name: plot
description: Git-native planning workflow for software development
author: Max Albrecht

scripts.test:board: pnpm --filter @plot-pm/board build && pnpm --filter @plot-pm/board test && pnpm --filter @plot-pm/board exec vitest run
scripts.changeset: cp .changeset/_template ".changeset/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md" && echo 'Created changeset — edit it now'
scripts.version: bash .dev/scripts/bump-skill-versions.sh && changeset version && bash .dev/scripts/sync-versions.sh && pnpm run build:board
scripts.release: pnpm run version && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: release v$(jq -r .version package.json)" && git tag "v$(jq -r .version package.json)" && echo 'Release committed and tagged. Run: git push --follow-tags'
